title: T3 Ingestion: Voice-review + ratify first ingestion
prompt: Session 2 of the first canonical ingestion (locked split: T3-01 harvested + drafted canonical/skills/review-dimensional/ in David's voice; this ticket is voice-review + ratify). Run the mechanical validation checklist against the draft, build a voice-review pack at backlog/wargames/proof/T3-02/REVIEW.md, then PAUSE for David's human decision via engine/store/needs-decision/wg-t3-02-ratify-first-ingestion.json -> engine/store/decisions/ — this pause is DESIGNED, not a failure: if no decision arrives this run, park and stop; a post-decision re-dispatch resumes via the war game's re-entry router. On David's verdict: approve/redirect -> apply fixes/corrections, flip provenance rewrite_status to ratified, register in canonical/INDEX.md, close backlog/2026-05-18-first-ingestion-code-review.md; decline -> record verbatim, ratify nothing. Either way, append the first evidence-backed corrections to docs/david-style-patterns.md and write backlog/wargames/proof/T3-02/REPORT.md. NEVER write the decision file yourself or infer approval from silence, and never touch research/, engine code, or anything in ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins/. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-02-ratify-first-ingestion.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: Ratified path: python3 reads canonical/skills/review-dimensional/provenance.json and rewrite_status == 'ratified' with version 1, every origins[].verbatim_copy existing and kept[] non-empty; canonical/INDEX.md has a review-dimensional row and 'Total artifacts ratified: 1'; backlog/done/2026-05-18-first-ingestion-code-review.md exists with a '## Result' section; docs/david-style-patterns.md greps >=1 for 'evidence: review-dimensional' and 0 for 'seed version'; backlog/wargames/proof/T3-02/REVIEW.md and REPORT.md exist; engine/store/decisions/wg-t3-02-ratify-first-ingestion.json exists (David really decided); engine/store/results/wg-t3-02-ratify-first-ingestion.json exists; a wg-t3-02 commit is in git log. Declined path: same pack/report/decision/results/commit checks, but rewrite_status unchanged, INDEX.md still 'Total artifacts ratified: 0', backlog item still open with a '## Status' quoting the decline, REPORT.md outcome DECLINED. Any path: git status of research/ untouched, and git -C ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins status shows no changes under appydave/skills/delivery-review or the review-* voice anchors. A run that ends parked (needs-decision file present, no decision yet, ticket in running/) is a valid intermediate state, not a failure.
